prestazioni: Engine: P300 Ingenium AJ20P 2.0L Turbocharged I4 (300 PS stock) – Full Stage 2 ECU remap via Dimsport Genius with custom dyno-tuned fueling and ignition maps, targeting 380 PS at 5,500 RPM and 520 Nm torque (stock: 400 Nm) via upgraded high-flow fuel injectors (Bosch 0280158122) and a high-pressure fuel pump (Continental HPFP upgrade).

Forced Induction: Hybrid turbocharger upgrade using a Garrett GTX3071R Gen II with billet compressor wheel (60mm inducer, 71mm exducer) and Inconel turbine wheel, paired with a custom 3.5-inch downpipe (Milltek Sport catless) and a front-mount intercooler (PWR Advanced Cooling, 10-row core, 100% aluminum construction).

Suspension & Handling: Full Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilover kit (Velar-specific valving, 20-way adjustable compression/rebound damping) with Eibach Pro-Kit lowering springs (-30mm front, -25mm rear), paired with SuperPro polyurethane bushings (full rear subframe kit, front control arm kit) and a Whiteline front sway bar (24mm adjustable).
estetica: Aero: Liberty Walk LB Works Velar-specific widebody kit (carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and rear diffuser) with integrated canards (front) and a custom 3D-printed rear wing (dual-element, adjustable angle, 3K twill carbon fiber).

Wheels & Brakes: Rotiform LAS-R 21x10.5 ET35 (front) and 21x11.5 ET40 (rear) forged wheels with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/40 R21 front, 295/35 R21 rear), paired with AP Racing Radi-CAL 6-piston front calipers (380mm discs) and 4-piston rear calipers (365mm discs) with Ferodo DS2500 pads.

Exterior & Lighting: Full 3M Matte Military Green wrap with Xpel Ultimate PPF on high-impact areas, custom LED headlight retrofit (Lux H1 Projector with Osram 5500K bulbs), and a full carbon fiber hood (Seibon Carbon, dry carbon, OEM-style latches) with integrated NACA ducts for brake cooling.
